arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Auto Scaling group.

availability_zones.description: The availability zones in which instances in the Auto Scaling group can be created.

default_cooldown.description: The amount of time, in seconds, after a scaling activity completes before another can start.

desired_capacity.description: The desired number of instances in the Auto Scaling group.

desired_capacity_type.description: The type of desired capacity, which can be either fixed or percentage.

enabled_metrics.description: A list of metrics enabled for monitoring the Auto Scaling group.

health_check_grace_period.description: The time in seconds that Auto Scaling waits before checking the health status of an instance.

health_check_type.description: The service to use for the health checks, either EC2 or ELB.

id.description: The ID of the Auto Scaling group.

instance_maintenance_policy.description: The maintenance policy for instances in the Auto Scaling group, including healthy percentage limits.

launch_configuration.description: The name of the launch configuration used by the Auto Scaling group.

launch_template.description: The launch template used by the Auto Scaling group, including its ID, name, and version.

load_balancers.description: A list of load balancers associated with the Auto Scaling group.

max_instance_lifetime.description: The maximum amount of time, in seconds, an instance can be in service.

max_size.description: The maximum number of instances allowed in the Auto Scaling group.

min_size.description: The minimum number of instances allowed in the Auto Scaling group.

mixed_instances_policy.description: Configuration for a mixed instances policy, allowing different instance types and pricing strategies.

new_instances_protected_from_scale_in.description: Whether new instances are protected from being terminated during scale-in activities.

placement_group.description: The name of the placement group into which you'll launch your instances, if any.

predicted_capacity.description: The predicted capacity of the Auto Scaling group based on metrics and policies.

service_linked_role_arn.description: The ARN of the service-linked role that the Auto Scaling group uses to call other AWS services.

status.description: The current status of the Auto Scaling group.

suspended_processes.description: A list of processes that are currently suspended for the Auto Scaling group.

tag.description: The tags associated with the Auto Scaling group, including whether they propagate at launch.

target_group_arns.description: A list of target group ARNs associated with the Auto Scaling group.

termination_policies.description: A list of termination policies that control which instances are terminated during scale-in events.

traffic_source.description: Information about the traffic sources associated with the Auto Scaling group.

vpc_zone_identifier.description: A list of subnet IDs for the VPC zones in which instances in the Auto Scaling group can be created.

warm_pool.description: Configuration for a warm pool, allowing instances to be kept in a 'warm' state ready to be added to the group.

warm_pool_size.description: The size of the warm pool, specifying how many instances to keep in a 'warm' state.
